name: Jamaica Ginger Beer
directions: Pound the ginger.
Mix it with the honey, juice, sugar and water in a jug.
Dissolve the yeast in a spoonful of water.
Add yeast to the beaten egg white.
Add the egg/yeast to the rest and stir.
Let stand in a cool dark place for a couple of days and it will start bubbling, which means it is fermenting.
After several more days the bubbling stops, which means it is ready.

name: Caribbean Tea Mix
directions: In a food processor, combine all the ingredients and process until blended well.
Store in a airtight container.
TO SERVE: Stir 2 level Tablespoons tea mix into 6 ounces of hot water.
Makes about 3 cups of tea mix.

name: Island Mudslide
directions: Mix all in a blender.

name: Kokomo Cocktail
directions: Mix ingredients in a shaker.
Shake well.
Serve in a tall coctail glass.
Sprinkle with coconut.
Serve with a straw, a wedge of lemon/cherry, or coctail umbrella.

name: Caribbean Coffee
directions: Rim glass with pink sugar, pour hot coffee into glass, add remaining ingredients, except whipped cream, top with whipped cream and sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.

name: Chewbacca
directions: Mix and serve over ice!
Enjoy.

name: Toasted Almond
directions: Pour over ice, mix well,& enjoy!

name: Jamaican Breeze
directions: Muddle the ginger and rum together in the bottom of a shaker, then add ice and the remaining ingredients.
Shake and strain into a highball glass filled with ice.

name: Black Tuesday
directions: Add ingredients in Blender along with some Ice cubes then push that button-- you are now good to go!

name: Bahamian Flame!
directions: Pour the coconut rum in your favourite shot glass.
Carefully, pour the 151 proof rum on top.
Ignite and serve immediately.

name: Summer Jamaican 10-Speed
directions: Mix liquers and juice in glass.
Fill remaining glass with half and half.
Shake.

name: Mauby- Sugar Free
directions: cook mauby in water strain.
mix mauby liquib with all ingredients.
serve over ice.

name: Ginger Beer Sugar Free
directions: blend ginger with water, strain.
mix all ingredients.

name: Sorrel Drink
directions: cook sorrel for 30 minutes, strain.
mix all ingredients.
serve cold over ice.

name: Ponche De Crème
directions: Beat eggs and lime peel until light and fluffy.
Add evaporated milk.
Sweeten to taste with condensed milk.
Add bitters, grated nutmeg and rum according to one's taste.
Mix well.
Remove the lime peel, bottle and refrigerate.
Serve with crushed ice and a sprinkle of freshly grated nutmeg.
Servings are approximate because the ingredients are to taste and some people will use more or less of an item.

name: Aqua Verde
directions: Fill a sugar-rimmed glass with ice.
Add all ingredients and stir.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Yellow Bird
directions: Shake well.
Serve in tall glass with ice cubes.
Decorate with a cherry and orange slice (optional).

name: Coco-Loco (Dominican Republic)
directions: Cut 3 inch hole in the coconut.
Pour in the tequila, rum and gin.
Add several ice cubes and stir in the grenadine.
Throw in a slice of lemon and a straw.
ENJOY.

similar.name: Orange Colada from the Virgin Islands

name: Shame and Scandal (Caribbean Islands)
directions: Shake well.
Fill tall glass with ice.
Pour over ice.
Decorate with cherry, orange slice and pineapple slice.

name: St Kitts Manhattan
directions: Put a few ice cubes into a shaker.  Splash on a dash or two of Angostura bitters.
Add the rum and vermouth.  Cover the shaker, and shake gently until it is nice and cold.
Strain and pour into a chilled Manhattan glass.

name: Ginger Liqueur - Antilles
directions: Take a 14 oz jar of ginger maramlade, and 1 - 2 pints of dark rum. Start with 1 pint, and see if you would like a more rummy taste.  If so, add more rum.
Mix well.
Let it sit for an hour.  Stir.
Filter this, first using a sieve over a bowl, and secondly filter it using coffee filters.
Pour this into a bottle using a funnel.

name: Shrubb - Antilles
directions: Take the zest from 5 oranges, and let this dry for 5 days.
When they are dry, macerate them in rum for 3 days, leaving the jar used outdoors in light sun (semi-shade).
Filter this liquid.
Make a syrup with the sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and the vanilla bean.  (Slit the vanilla bean to release full flavor into the syrup.).
Bring this to the boil, lower the heat, but keep it bubbling away for 10 - 15 minutes. Skim the surface frequently.
Let the syrup cool.
Add the syrup to the filtered rum.  Filter this, and bottle it, or pour it into a large, clean juice jar with a lid.
This recipe will yield about 75cl, the same volume as a bottle of wine.

name: Caribbean Iced Tea
directions: Mix liquids together and serve over ice.  Garnish with the slice of lemon.

name: Painkiller
directions: Shake or stir ingredients, and pour over ice in a tall glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top, and serve,.

name: Ginger Limeade
directions: Mix the 1 cup of water with the ginger and squeeze through a strainer to get ginger concentrate.
Add sugar and lime juice.
Stir until all the sugar is dissolved. (If you like it sweeter you can add more, to taste, at this point.).
Pour into bottles and refrigerate. Chill well.
When ready to serve, add a teaspoonful of  concentrate to chilled water or sprite and mix well.
Serve garnished with a mint leaf.

name: Coconut Pie Cocktail
directions: Combine ingredients in a glass & serve with ice.

name: Cafe Foster
directions: Combine ingredients in a coffee mug.
Top with whipped cream.

name: El Chi Pi Chi Pi (A Puerto Rican Rum Drink)
directions: Pour rum and orange-pineapple juice into a highball glass with ice. Splash with grenadine and stir. Garnish with orange if desired.

name: Hotel Riley Rum Cocktail
directions: Add vodka, rum, amaretto, lime juice and pineapple juice to a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake and pour over ice in a highball glass .
Garnish with pineapple wedge.

name: Malibu Bomber Cocktail
directions: Pour Malibu rum over ice in a whiskey sour glass. Add orange juice and cranberry juice, and splash with tropical liqueur or schnapps. Stir, and serve.

name: Blue Dream Cocktail
directions: Pour the Malibu coconut rum into a pina colada glass over ice. Add the pina colada mix and blue curacao; serve unstirred to see color difference, stir when ready to drink. It's very pretty. Serve with whipped cream on top if you wish.

name: Puerto Rican Sangria
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pitcher, chill for at least an hour and enjoy.

name: Key Lime Pie Shot / Shooter
directions: Combine ingredients with ice in a cocktail shaker. Shake, strain into shot glasses, and serve.

name: Lime Lizard Shooter
directions: Pour vodka into a shot glass and mix in the other ingredients. Count to three and drink. Shake on ice and strain if you prefer this shooter cold.

name: Berryessa Blast Drink
directions: Pour the gold rum and Southern Comfort into an old-fashioned glass half-filled with ice cubes. (I used a highball glass).
Add guava juice to taste, and serve.

name: Island Girl Drink
directions: Add all ingredients to a highball glass, roll, and serve.

name: 99 Bananas and a Coconut Cocktail
directions: Fill shaker with ice and add all ingredients. Shake briskly like a monkey shakes a coconut. Pour into a beautiful glass and enjoy.

name: Rum Rebellion Cocktail
directions: Combine in a cocktail shaker and serve over ice.

name: Enticing Azul Bebida (Cocktail)
directions: In large wine glass or cocktail glass pour limoncello and curacao over ice.
Squeeze the juice of 1/2 lemon into glass.
Add club soda to fill to the top (approx 3 oz).
Stir well. Garnish and enjoy! Pura Vida!

name: Brass Monkey from Miami (Cocktail)
directions: Pour over ice in tall glass, stir and drink.
Garnish with orange slice if desired.

name: Ocean Cruiser (Frozen Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Put all ingredients in blender with 1/2 cup ice.  Blend.  Add more ice as you wish.

name: Coco Loco (Royal Caribbean's Version)
directions: Blend all ingredients with 1/2 cup ice.  Add more ice as you wish.

name: Applebee's Bahama Mama
directions: Layer ingredients (in order) in a glass.

name: Caribbean Delight
directions: Pour the coconut rum, vanilla schnapps and vodka into a highball glass.
Add Sprite, and serve.

name: Caribbean Kiss
directions: Dip the rim of a cocktail glass into kahlua, and into brown sugar.
Shake the liquors and cream with ice, strain into a frosted martini glass and sprinkle with cinnamon.
NOTE: This drink is also awesome, blended with ice, as a frozen drink.

name: Peanut Punch
directions: Combine peanut butter, condensed milk, vanilla, bitters and water in a pitcher.
Whisk until peanut butter is dissolved.
Pour into tall glasses filled with ice cubes and serve immediately.

name: Martinique Fizz
directions: Blend ingredients with crushed ice - pour into a tall glass and top with ginger ale.

name: Puerto Rican Yellow Bird Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients together, pour over ice and garnish with an orange slice and a cherry.

name: Bahamian Sky Juice
directions: Using a screwdriver (or awl) and a hammer, poke through the eyes of the coconuts, and drain out the liquid through a strainer into a mixing bowl.  There should be a total of about 2 cups.  Set the shells aside.
Add the evaporated milk, gin, sugar if using, cinnamon and nutmeg to the coconut water.  Stir to dissolve the sugar.
Refrigerate the mixture until cold, at least 2 hours, or cool mixture down with ice.
To serve, carefully pour the mixture through a funnel into the reserved coconut shells.  Insert straws.

name: Orange Colada from the Virgin Islands
directions: In a blender combine; cruzan rum, along with pina colada mix,pineapple juice and orange juice.
Blend in crushed ice, when processed pour into glasses enjoy!

name: Jamaican Mule
directions: Fill highball glass with ice.
Add rum.
Squeeze lime wedge.
Fill glass with ginger beer.

name: Sailor's Coffee
directions: Poor hot coffee into a large wine glass, add sugar and stir to dissolve.  Add brandy and liqueur, stir and mix.  Float whipped cream on top (to prevent the cream from sinking, pour over back of spoon).  Sprinkle grated chocolate over top and serve immediately.

name: Bahamas Rum Punch (Cocktail)
directions: Pour all ingredients into a glass.
Use equal parts orange juice and pineapple juice.
You decide how much ice you want.
Play around with the amounts.

name: Papaya Gin Sling
directions: Shake gin,bitters,lime juice and papaya juice in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a collins glass filled with ice cubes, fill the rest of the way with soda water, stir and garnish with a pineapple stick or canned pineapple tidbits.

name: Boardwalk Breeze
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add rum and amaretto, shake well.
Pour into a hurricane glass filled with ice, add equal parts of orange and pineapple juice; float a dash of grenadine on top.
Set back in your beach chair and feel the ocean breeze.

similar.name: Orange Colada from the Virgin Islands

name: Jimmy Buffett's Margaritaville Perfect Margarita
directions: Combine all ingredients except for the lime into a shaker.
Squeeze 2 of the lime wedges into the shaker and then Shake Well.
Rim outside of glass only with lime and then with salt.
Add fresh crushed ice to glass and then strain mixture over ice. Squeeze remaining lime wedge in glass.

name: Razz-A-Ma-Shazz
directions: Mix in highball glass and garnish and serve.

name: Planter's Punch from Barbados
directions: Combine all ingredients except garnishes in a large pitcher and stir well.
Fill 4 tumblers with ice and divide the punch among them.
Garnish each drink with an orange slice & a cherry.

name: Cayman Lemonade
directions: Mix vodka, triple sec and peach schnapps in a shaker.
Pour over ice, add a squeeze of lime and a splash each of cranberry juice and soda, then stir and enjoy.

name: Cupids Arrow
directions: Blend milk, coconut cream, amaretto, and ice together.
Pour into glass; pour over the grenadine.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle of nutmeg.

name: Jamaican Coffee
directions: Fill 6 warmed cups 3/4 full of hot coffee, then pour in Tia Maria to top.
Sweeten lightly with sugar and serve.

name: Hibiscus Key Lime Cocktail (Tommy Bahama)
directions: Mix all ingredients together and strain into a Collins glass filled with ice.
Garnish with three key lime wheels.
HIBISCUS SYRUP:
Heat water and sugar in a small pot until sugar has melted. Remove from heat, add hibiscus and steep for 10 minutes. Remove hibiscus and cool.

name: Hornswaggle Peachy Keen Ginger Mojito
directions: Place in a blender everything but 6 ice cubes, soda and garnishes.
Blend till smooth.Place three ice cubes into two tall glasses.
Divide the drink mix into both glasses.
Top with seltzer or lemon lime soda if you want more sweetness.
Garnish with mint leaves.
Fer th' band 'o pirates:

Place in a blender everythin' but 6 ice cubes, soda 'n garnishes. Blend till smooth.Place three ice cubes into a pair tall monocle. Divide th' drink mix into both monocle. Top wit' seltzer or lemon lime soda if ye want more sweetness. Garnish wit' mint leaves.
Blimey!

name: Cafe Trade Wind
directions: Measure coffee into a flameproof glass pot.
Add orange peel and orange slices, steeping over low heat 15 minutes.
Add sugar and bitters, then strain and pour into warmed heatproof glasses.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Banana  Banshee  Cocktail
directions: blend til smooth.
garnish.

name: Crows Nest
directions: shake everything but lime to mix pour into old fashioned  glass that you have run lime around  lip and  dipped  in sugar.
garnish with lime.

name: Barbados Sunrise
directions: in tall glass.
put.
grenadine in bottom  of glas swirl a little.
fill with ice.
slowly pour  in oj.
mix rum and curacao.
slowly pour over oj.
garnish with orange.

name: Jamaican  Bush  Tea
directions: pour  boiling  water  over mint.
add sugar.
steep  5 minutes.
strain into.
2 cups.

name: Caribbean Carrot Punch
directions: Clean the carrots and grate them, or chop them into a food processor or blender.  Add the water and pulse until pureed.  It is best to do this in two batches.  Strain into a bowl using a fine strainer or cheese cloth.  Squeeze the pulp to get all of the juice.  You can strain a second time if you prefer less pulp in the juice.

Add the vanilla, cinnamon and nutmeg and stir well. Add the sweetened condensed milk to your taste. Start with 1/2 a can and add until it is sweet enough for you. Chill for a couple of hours and serve over ice.

name: Emotion
directions: Put juice, banana, rum, and syrup in a blender and blend until mixed well.
Put ice cubes in glasses & pour them half-full of cocktail mix.
Top with tonic.

name: Frozen Toasted Almond
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender. Serve in a tall stemmed glass.

name: Curacao Cocktail
directions: Place all ingredients except the orange in a blender and process until smooth and creamy.
Pour into a large cocktail glass and add an orange slice for garnish.
